name: walletguard-pro
description: Open-source Web3 wallet security suite. Real transaction simulation, MEV detection, calldata decoding, approval scanner (ERC-20+NFT), phishing detection, address book, ENS resolution, price oracle, stale tracker, wallet classifier, audit log, bulk multicall revoke, portfolio view, approval expiry reminders. 9 chains. Zero API keys. MIT licensed.

scripts.test: node test-typosquat.js && node test-integration.js && node test-multichain.js && node test-nft.js && node test-revoke.js && node test-build.js && node test-bugfixes.js && node test-seed-threats.js && node test-new-features.js && node test-blast-radius.js && node test-pattern-dna.js && node test-correlation.js && node test-i18n.js && node test-simulator-v2.js && node test-address-book.js && node test-eip7702.js && node test-session-key.js && node test-threat-feed.js && node test-wallet-dna.js && node test-drainer-detector.js && node test-visual-phish.js && node test-hw-wallet.js && node test-explain.js && node test-safe-multisig.js && node test-price-oracle.js && node test-ens-resolver.js && node test-stale-tracker.js && node test-wallet-classifier.js && node test-audit-log.js && node test-bulk-multicall.js && node test-portfolio-view.js && node test-onboarding.js && node test-injector.js && node test-approval-expiry.js
